title: Build token usage persistence and costs dashboard

log.context: Build token usage persistence and costs dashboard

Done. Here's what was built:

**Part 1 — Token usage persistence**

- `/mnt/data/scripts/log_token_usage.py` — CLI tool accepting `--session-id`, `--agent-id`, `--agent-name`, `--input-tokens`, `--output-tokens`, `--tool-uses`, `--duration-ms`. Writes to `/mnt/data/data/token-usage.db` with cost calc `(input * 0.000003) + (output * 0.000015)`. Creates DB/table on first run with a unique index on `agent_id` (upserts on conflict).
